auth.csrfTokenInvalid: Form session has expired. Refresh the page and try again.

users.reservedUserId: '{value}' is a reserved keyword, not a user ID. Use GET /api/auth/session to identify the current user.
users.grantStoreAccessOperatorOnly: Store access can only be granted to a user with the operator role
users.revokeStoreAccessOperatorOnly: Store access can only be revoked from a user with the operator role
users.acceptedInviteCannotBeCancelled: An accepted invitation cannot be cancelled
users.cannotDeleteOwnAccount: An administrator cannot delete their own account
users.invalidRole: Role must be admin or operator

stores.storeCodeAlreadyExists: A store with this code already exists
stores.noFieldsToUpdate: Provide at least one store field to update
stores.codeTooLongOrEmpty: Store code is required and must be no longer than 64 characters
stores.nameTooLongOrEmpty: Store name is required and must be no longer than 255 characters
stores.timezoneTooLong: Store timezone must be no longer than 128 characters

products.productPluAlreadyExists: A product with this PLU already exists

products.shortNameTooLongOrEmpty: Product short name is required and must be no longer than 128 characters

catalog.categoryNotFound: Category not found in active catalog
catalog.parentCategoryNotFound: Parent category not found in active catalog
catalog.categoryCannotBeOwnParent: A category cannot be its own parent
catalog.parentChangeCreatesCycle: Changing the parent category would create a cycle

catalog.categoryIdsCannotBeEmpty: categoryIds must contain at least one category ID
catalog.categoriesMustShareCatalogAndLevel: All categories to reorder must belong to the same catalog and parent level
catalog.activePlacementExistsCreate: The product already has an active placement in this catalog. Move the existing placement instead.

catalog.placementIdsCannotBeEmpty: placementIds must contain at least one placement ID
catalog.placementsMustShareCatalogAndCategory: All placements to reorder must belong to the same catalog and category
catalog.placementNotFound: Placement not found in active catalog
catalog.activePlacementProductMustBeActive: An archived or inactive product cannot be used in an active placement
catalog.activePlacementCategoryMustBeActive: An archived or inactive category cannot be used in an active placement

catalog.categoryShortNameTooLongOrEmpty: Category short name is required and must be no longer than 128 characters
